scope: Astro static site (project root) — Nav + Footer + i18n only

files_changed.purpose: Add nav.blog: 'Blog' and nav.blog_aria: 'Blog (se abre en una pestaña nueva)' near line 7, alongside the existing nav.* keys
Add nav.blog: 'Blog' and nav.blog_aria: 'Blog (opens in a new tab)' near line 7, alongside the existing nav.* keys
Add nav.blog: '博客' and nav.blog_aria: '博客（在新标签页中打开）' near line 7, alongside the existing nav.* keys

Extend navLinks item shape with optional external/ariaKey fields; append { key: 'nav.blog', href: 'https://blog.aconcagua.co', external: true, ariaKey: 'nav.blog_aria' }; render external links with target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, aria-label, and a 12px aria-hidden inline external-link SVG in BOTH the desktop .nav-links loop (~line 27) and the mobile .nav-overlay loop (~line 64). Add a scoped .nav-link-external-icon rule (currentColor, 12px, opacity 0.75) to the component <style> block.

Append the same Blog entry to the local navLinks array (~line 9). Update the .footer-links map in the Navigation column (~line 83) to render external links with target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, aria-label, and an 11px aria-hidden inline external-link SVG. Add a scoped .footer-link-external-icon rule (currentColor, 11px, opacity 0.6) to the component <style> block.

i18n_keys_added.es: Blog (se abre en una pestaña nueva)
i18n_keys_added.zh: 博客（在新标签页中打开）

exposure_surfaces: Nav.astro desktop bar (.nav-links) — renders on every page (all 3 locale index pages + 3 privacy pages)

locale_parity.es: covered via shared Nav + Footer mounted in src/pages/index.astro
locale_parity.en: covered via shared Nav + Footer mounted in src/pages/en/index.astro
locale_parity.zh: covered via shared Nav + Footer mounted in src/pages/zh/index.astro

no_changes_needed: astro.config.mjs (blog is on a separate subdomain — no project-route redirect required)
src/pages/*.astro (Nav and Footer are already imported and mounted on every page)
validation_gate: npm run build (must exit 0 with zero @astrojs/check errors/warnings)
manual_verification: Sections 5.A / 5.B / 5.C / 5.D in the spec — verify across /, /en/, /zh/ on desktop + mobile overlay, both light and dark themes, with keyboard navigation
accessibility_notes: External Blog link carries a localized aria-label that includes 'opens in a new tab' phrasing
Inline external-link SVG is aria-hidden='true' to avoid duplicating the accessible name
rel='noopener noreferrer' on every Blog anchor (security)
Mobile-overlay focus trap (Nav.astro line ~98) continues to include the Blog link automatically since it queries 'a[href], button:not([disabled])'
No new animations introduced — prefers-reduced-motion unaffected
assumptions: Blog URL is identical across all three locales (single subdomain blog.aconcagua.co serves all audiences). If localized blog URLs are introduced later, the URL should be moved into i18n as a 'blog.url' key per the existing 'calendly.url' / 'cta.whatsapp_url' pattern.
report_summary: Spec added at specs/feat-1099-issue-99-add-blog-link-to-site.md. Plan updates Nav.astro + Footer.astro to surface a 'Blog' link to https://blog.aconcagua.co, with a localized aria-label, target=_blank + rel=noopener noreferrer, and a small aria-hidden external-link SVG. Adds two i18n keys (nav.blog, nav.blog_aria) to all three locale dictionaries. No new dependencies, no new pages, no astro.config changes. Validation gate is npm run build.
